title: frankenia hirsuta subsp. hispida
intro: Frankenia hirsuta subsp. hispida is a subspecies of the Frankenia hirsuta plant, also known as hairy frankenia or hairy sea heath. This succulent shrub is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Frankenia hirsuta subsp. hispida include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various skin conditions and infections. Frankenia hirsuta subsp. hispida can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
